verification.label: Email verification
verification.helper1: An email with a 6-digit code has been sent to your email. Enter it below to verify your email.
verification.helper2: If the email hasn't arrived, check the "Spam" folder or click the button below to resend it through {seconds} {seconds, plural, one {second} few {seconds} many {seconds} other {seconds}}.

errors.email_the_same: New email cannot be the same as the current one
errors.password_not_supported: Account has no password, use social networks to login or restore password
errors.password_the_same: New password cannot be the same as the current one
